items.raw_desc: Utánfutó zár Knott Original biztonsági doboz PRO:        Compared to the standard ALBE Safety box, the XL version has a hinge at the top and a narrow recess for the ball neck at the bottom. After opening, the lock can be fitted from above to the towing coupling connected to the ball pin of the towing bracket. After clamping, the lock is secured by inserting the locking shackle and locked with a padlock. The lock can also be used to lock a detached trailer. This type is very popular with users who often leave the trailer plugged in behind the car.  Included in the package is a custom drop-down lock body, locking shackle and a stainless steel disc lock with two keys. The lock is not suitable for use on special stabilising drawbar couplings. items.raw_desc: Szervízkészlet Sixtol Sada pro podtlakové/vakuové testování brzdových systémů Mechanic Brake Tester 22:The MECHANIC BRAKE TESTER 22 SIXTOL 22-piece service set for vacuum/pressure testing of brake systems is an important tool for the diagnosis and maintenance of brake systems in various types of vehicles. This kit allows you to perform vacuum/vacuum tests to detect potential brake system problems such as cracked hoses, leaks, or brake booster failures. The kit includes a metal pump with pressure gauge, two long elastic hoses, three short elastic hoses, two reservoirs for operating fluids, two caps and a set of clamps and connectors. This kit is used to test the pressure and vacuum of the vacuum solenoid valve, MAP sensors, fuel tank and brake bleeding systems. The tools are stored in a plastic case for easy storage and transport. Kerékpárszállító tetőre AMOS kerékpártartó:



	
		
			The great advantage of the AMOS carrier is the proven and at the same time completely simple 3-point quick-release mechanism. It can hold one bicycle and is designed to be mounted on the roof of your car. Simply clamp the bicycle by the frame tube into the quick-release nut . Then you simply fasten the rims with the straps and you can set off. The nut is robust, easy to grip in the palm of your hand and is also equipped with a lock to secure the bike against theft. You will be able to move away from your car with the knowledge that your bike is completely safe in the AMOS bike carrier. 
		
	
	
		
			
				Key features of AMOS car roof carrier
			
			
				Reliable 3-point clamping system
				Well-fitting wide nut
				Lockable system
				Designed for roof mounting
				Load capacity 18 kg
				Holds 1 bicycle
